rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Parties to make a first appearance on this matter. 2) Procedural issues: a. The petition has not been verified by Petitioner. b. Supplement objection filed on 1/31/19 has not been verified by Respondent. c. Jason Barrera and Eliana Barrera (children of Decedent) have not been provided notice. It is unclear from the request made in the petition whether personal notice should be required. d. Courtesy copy of the Reply filed on 2/14/19 has not been delivered.
